prompt: A cinematic anime-style fantasy movie poster featuring a female knight standing in the center of a cobblestone courtyard. She has long flowing {argument name="hair color" default="silver"} hair and wears ornate white and dark blue armor with gold accents and a long, billowing white cape decorated with star motifs. She holds a glowing, magical sword pointing downwards, emitting bright blue starlight and magical particles. The background is a breathtaking, highly detailed gothic fantasy castle and cityscape at night. The night sky is spectacular, filled with a glowing milky way, a crescent moon, and numerous shooting stars. The lighting is dramatic and ethereal, with the glowing sword illuminating the cobblestones. At the very top center, small elegant Japanese text reads "{argument name="top catchphrase" default="願いは、星に選ばれた。"}". In the lower third, large, elegant Japanese typography reads "{argument name="main title" default="星剣のレガリア"}". Just below the main title, smaller English text reads "{argument name="english subtitle" default="REGALIA OF THE STARBLADE"}". At the very bottom, small Japanese text reads "{argument name="bottom tagline" default="星が墜ちる夜、王国最後の継承が始まる。"}".
translatedPrompt: 一张电影质感的动漫风奇幻电影海报，画面中央是一位站在鹅卵石庭院中的女骑士。她留着一头飘逸的 {argument name="hair color" default="银色"} 长发，身穿饰有金色点缀的华丽白蓝相间盔甲，披着一件印有星形图案的长款飘逸白斗篷。她手持一把向下指引、散发着明亮蓝色星光与魔法粒子的发光魔剑。背景是令人惊叹且细节丰富的哥特式奇幻城堡与夜间城市景观。夜空壮丽，布满了发光的银河、一弯新月和无数流星。光影效果戏剧性且空灵，发光的剑照亮了脚下的鹅卵石。在顶部正中央，有一行优雅的小字日文：“{argument name="top catchphrase" default="願いは、星に選ばれた。"}”。在画面下三分之一处，有醒目且优雅的日文大标题：“{argument name="main title" default="星剣のレガリア"}”。主标题下方是一行较小的英文副标题：“{argument name="english subtitle" default="REGALIA OF THE STARBLADE"}”。在最底部，有一行小字日文：“{argument name="bottom tagline" default="星が墜ちる夜、王国最後の継承が始まる。"}”。

breakdown.creativeCore: 奇幻动漫风骑士电影海报：生成一张电影质感的动漫风奇幻海报，包含女骑士、发光的剑、星空城堡背景以及可自定义的排版。
breakdown.subject: 文字符号
breakdown.bestUse: 电影海报、音乐封面、书籍封面、播客封面

analysis.copyTemplate:
Create a 海报/封面 image for [用途/受众].

Main subject:
[主体]，[数量/状态/动作]，[关键外观/材质/身份]。

Scene:
[地点/环境]，[时间/天气/时代]，[背景元素]。

Composition:
[景别/角度/版式层级/主体位置]。

Visual style:
[参考风格: cinematic, anime, fantasy]。

Lighting and camera:
[光线/镜头/景深/质感]。

Text requirements:
文字是主视觉。

Quality constraints:
clean, coherent, polished, readable hierarchy, no random text, no visual clutter.
